macro.title: Tesla launches solution to end Supercharger fights once and for all - Teslarati
macro.summary: Tesla is launching its solution to end Supercharger fights once and for all, eliminating any confusion on who is to charge next at a congested location. Last year, a notable incident at a Tesla Supercharger led to a fight, and it all stemmed from a disagreeme…

macro.title: A town of 7,000 planned so many data centers, it’s like adding 51 Walmarts - The Washington Post
macro.summary: Developers plan to build six sprawling data center campuses in Archbald, Pennsylvania, covering about 14 percent of the town’s land. Residents are fighting back.
